meaning: n.[律]证人,目击者,证据,证明,证词vt.目击,为...作证,证明,表明vi.作证,成为证据
examples: He took the stand as the first witness.
He has been witness to a terrible murder.
He is trying to improperly influence a witness.
The observation desk is also witness to proposals of marriage almost daily, according to unofficial tallies.
But less than two years later, he was a helpless witness to abject misery when Australia triumphed 5-0.
